description:
Automated staging procedures for Cisco devices

Provision through Jinja2 templates with only a serial port
Currently supports full upgrade automation for IOS and IOS-XE devices

Tested on:
- Cisco ISR 4000 Series Routers
- Cisco 3850
- Cisco 3650
- Cisco 2960X
confidentiality: Company Confidential - Approved for External /3rd party use
